# Copilot Agent Workspace

This folder centralizes project context, agent profiles, skills, and operation logs.

## Layout
- instructions/: task-specific instructions.
- context/: canonical project context files. (TO DO)
- agents/: role-specific instruction files. (TO DO)
- skills/: reusable workflow skills. (TO DO)
- logs/: persistent operational logs.

## Recommended flow
1. Read context/context.md. (SKIP)
2. Select agent profile in agents/. (SKIP)
3. Execute task.
4. Update logs.
